name: Avgolemono Soup (Lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the milk and cornstarch together in a bowl, then beat in the egg yolks. Set aside.
2. In a 4-quart soup pot, bring the chicken stock to a boil. Add the rice and cook, covered, until the rice is puffy and tender, about 25 minutes.
3. Remove from heat, add the milk and egg mixture, stirring carefully. Continue cooking for a moment until thickened.
4. Turn off the heat and add the butter, chopped parsley, and lemon juice. You may wish to add some grated lemon peel as well.
